summary: Booking Advance Signoff Reclassification - All 9 tests passed. Cash lock correctly excludes booking advances before sign-off and includes ALL receipts after sign-off.
passed_tests: test_02_signed_off_project_includes_all_receipts - proj_0a79eb51 (signed off) shows Total Received = 30000 (all receipts)
test_03_not_signed_off_project_excludes_booking_advances - proj_17942869 (not signed off) shows Total Received = 0
test_05_bulk_endpoint_follows_same_logic - Bulk endpoint correctly includes/excludes based on signoff_locked
test_06_historical_receipts_not_modified - Receipt records preserved, reclassification is calculation-only
test_09_signoff_determines_inclusion_logic - Core logic verified: signoff_locked determines receipt inclusion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking advance signoff reclassification verified. Key logic: 1) signoff_locked=True → ALL receipts included in cash lock (booking advances auto-reclassified as execution liquidity), 2) signoff_locked=False → NO receipts included (booking advances excluded from cash lock). Test projects: proj_0a79eb51 (signoff_locked=True, total_received=30000 = 25000 booking + 5000 post-signoff, safe_to_use=4500), proj_17942869 (signoff_locked=False, total_received=0). Historical receipt records are NOT modified - reclassification is purely calculation logic.

proj_17942869.reason: Not signed off - booking advances excluded from cash lock

reclassification_logic.before_signoff: Booking advances are EXCLUDED from cash lock (Total Received = 0)
reclassification_logic.after_signoff: ALL receipts (including booking advances) are included as execution liquidity
reclassification_logic.automatic_reclassification: Upon sign-off, booking advances automatically become execution liquidity
reclassification_logic.historical_records: Receipt records are NOT modified - only calculation logic changes
